case_title: LEMON, GUY vs. KARMALYUKE, MIKE et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEMON, GUY AS TO DEFENDANT KARMALYUKE, MIKE DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-25-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-26-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-05-1996

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-28-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS CONTINUED FROM 5/28/96: PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF SERVED. HEARING SET FOR JUN-27-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-25-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON APR-25-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-29-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-29-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND FAILURE TO PERFECT ENTRY OF DEFAULT. THE REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT SUBMITTED ON 7/17/96 WAS REJECTED BECAUSE DEFENDANT'S NAME WAS MISSPELLED. PLAINTIFF TO FILE CORRECTED ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND PROCESS ACCORDING TO THE RULES., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-20-1996 CONTINUED FROM JUL-29-1996 TO AUG-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-27-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-27-1996, FOR PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR AND BRING A DECLARATION DESCRIBING DEFENDANT'S CURRENT BANKRUPTCY CASE. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTIFIED. HEARING SET FOR MAR-27-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-27-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-27-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DISCHARGED: SET FOR 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF FAILED TO APPEAR. HEARING SET FOR JUL-29-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-28-1997, DISMISSAL FOR FAILURES TO APPEAR AT SC AND OSCS', FAILURE TO FILE SC AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEMON, GUY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-28-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-28-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: $200.00 ADDITIONAL SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED BUT STAYED UNTIL 9/27/96. $100.00 SANCTIONS PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED ARE DUE AND PAYABLE. PLTF. TO FILE A COPY OF DEFT'S BANKRUPTY PAPERS WITH THIS COURT BY 9/25/96. FAILURE TO FILE SAID DOCUMENTS WILL RESULT IN THE COURT DISMISSING THE CASE. HEARING SET FOR SEP-27-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEMON, GUY

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-27-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE 2ND OSC ON PLTF FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR, FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT'S 9-27-96 ORDER. HEARING SET FOR APR-28-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF APR-28-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH 9/27/96 ORDER, 3RD OSC ON PLAINTIFF. HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
